title: Hieracium sukaczewii

Hieracium sukaczewii belongs to the family Asteraceae and is a species of flowering plant in the genus Hieracium. Within the Asteraceae family, it is classified as part of the tribe Senecioneae, due to its characteristics and genetic similarities to other species within the tribe. This plant is native to certain regions, particularly Eastern Europe and the Caucasus region. As a member of the genus Hieracium, Hieracium sukaczewii is a type of hawkweed, known for its distinctive appearance and growth habits. The classification of Hieracium sukaczewii is a combination of its botanical and taxonomic characteristics, indicating its place within the larger plant kingdom.
